item.title: Meta's new model is Muse Spark, and meta.ai chat has some interesting tools 摘要
item.description:
Meta announced Muse Spark, its first new model since Llama 4, available as a hosted API preview on meta.ai with Facebook or Instagram login. It offers 'Instant' and 'Thinking' modes, with a future 'Contemplating' mode promised for longer reasoning. Benchmarks show it competitive with Opus 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and GPT 5.4, though behind on Terminal-Bench 2.0. The article details tools accessible via the model, including web browsing, Meta content search, image generation, Python code execution in a sandbox, HTML/SVG artifact creation, file editing, visual grounding for image analysis, sub-agent spawning, and third-party account linking. Examples include generating and analyzing images, such as a raccoon with a trash hat, and using visual grounding to detect objects.
标签: AI, LLM, Meta, Muse Spark, benchmarks, tools, image generation, code interpreter, visual grounding, API
